title: Senior Teacher - IDP Education India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IDP Education India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Senior Teacher in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
